idea-plugin.name: MarkdownNeat
idea-plugin.description:
MarkdownNeat is a read-only Markdown viewer for JetBrains IDEs.

It renders GitHub Flavored Markdown and Mermaid diagrams offline with Light and Dark themes independent of the IDE.

  • GitHub Flavored Markdown and Mermaid diagrams
  • Independent Light and Dark themes
  • Automatic refresh with relative images and links
  • Offline rendering with untrusted content sanitization

While enabled, MarkdownNeat opens supported Markdown and Mermaid files in its read-only viewer. AI and IDE tools can continue to modify the underlying files.

See the roadmap for implemented and planned features.
